positive: A stylized, minimalist forest scene featuring a luminous, ethereal fox leaping over stylized, geometric river stones. The art style should combine Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetics with modern, clean vector line work. Composition must be centrally focused, suitable for a repeat pattern or apparel placement. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, forest green, and cream. The fox should have a clean, sharp silhouette against a solid background, giving it a powerful, striking presence. Strong directional lighting that emphasizes the fox's fur texture and the surrounding botanical elements (ferns, simplified bamboo). Vector art, flat colors, sharp lines, maximum contrast, high detail, clean silhouette, printable quality, centered.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, low detail, watermark, text, logos, trademarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy composition, photorealism, gradient, noise, out of focus, signature, cartoon, painting texture
